title: coleus maculosus
intro: Coleus maculosus, also known as Coleus aromaticus or Coleus scutellaroides, is a perennial plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coleus maculosus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
